description: A small business owner has submitted an online application to renew their business license. An operator must process it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a pending business license renewal application from the queue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent opens the next available application.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all required information has been provided and the renewal fee has been paid.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the application is complete and payment was successful.

nodes.task_description: Approve the renewal and issue a new digital license certificate to the business owner.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully approves and issues the license.
